transcript:
Dana: Thanks for making time, Priya. Last we spoke you were weighing whether to build the agent platform in-house. Where did that land?
Priya: We talked it over. We're going to buy rather than build for the orchestration layer. The team would rather not own that long term.
Dana: That's great to hear. What's driving the timing?
Priya: We want something in production before our Q4 robotics launch, so we're targeting a decision by end of August. Budget-wise I'm thinking somewhere around fifty thousand for year one, but I still need to get our VP Finance to sign off.
Dana: Understood. Who else needs to be involved in the evaluation?
Priya: Our security lead, Tom, will want to do a review. And I'd loop in my VP Finance, Anita, for the commercial side.
Dana: Perfect. As a next step I'll put together a tailored technical evaluation plan and send it over this week. Does that work?
Priya: Yes, send that over and I'll get Tom scheduled.
Dana: Will do. I'll follow up by Friday.
